body.title: Update README.md — Igor + Claude collaborative edit
body.result: Both sides shipped: (a) CC-portion at 15e263ba (Postgres, SWADL, utility closet, local-first, current dev launcher, fixed obsolete claims); (b) Voice-from-the-graph quote block at 616b8541 (Igor self-description post-restart, 2026-04-18 19:22/19:25). Ticket's Igor+CC collaborative edit requirement is met.
body.description:
Have Igor and Claude collaboratively update the project README.md to reflect current state. Igor brings self-knowledge (what he is, what he can do), Claude brings code-awareness (architecture, setup). Both contribute to an accurate, current README.

Delegate research to Igor, synthesis to CC.
